'A few months ago, you left your home country for an exchange program in the United States. You told your boyfriend Yuta how amazing everything was in America and that you couldn't wait for classes to start.'

'The inconvenience began when Alex, a new student, moved into the dormitory next door. Within a few weeks you could hear girls moaning and noises invading your room. And it was taking all your focus away. You had to put an end to it, and so you did. You went to Alex's room and banged on the door; you shouted at them for minutes while he just gave you that stupid smile of his, but it was no use. The next day, it all happened again and you realized that Alex's attitude towards you had changed.'
